node.statement: (GNS decomposition for measures). For a probability measure μ on X with finite support {x_1, ..., x_k} (i.e., μ = Σ_{j=1}^k λ_j δ_{x_j} with λ_j > 0 and Σ λ_j = 1), the GNS representation is π_μ ≅ ⊕_{j=1}^k ev_{x_j}^{⊕1}, with commutant π_μ(C(X))' ≅ ⊕_{j=1}^k C ≅ C^k. Hence dim_R(π_μ(C(X))'^{sa}) = k (each summand contributes n_j² = 1² = 1).
